message:
chore: update dependencies in Cargo.toml and Cargo.lock

Dependency version bumps in Cargo.toml (+6/-6 lines) with
corresponding Cargo.lock refresh (+250/-286 across transitive deps).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

-fsqlite-error = "0.1.0"
-fsqlite-core = "0.1.0"
-fsqlite-func = "0.1.0"
-fsqlite-vdbe = "0.1.0"
-fsqlite-vfs = "0.1.0"
-fsqlite-pager = "0.1.0"
-fsqlite-parser = "0.1.0"
-fsqlite-planner = "0.1.0"
-fsqlite-wal = "0.1.0"
-fsqlite-btree = "0.1.0"

-fsqlite-mvcc = "0.1.0"
-fsqlite-observability = "0.1.0"
+fsqlite = "0.1.1"

+fsqlite-core = "0.1.1"
+fsqlite-func = "0.1.1"
+fsqlite-vdbe = "0.1.1"
+fsqlite-vfs = "0.1.2"
+fsqlite-pager = "0.1.1"
+fsqlite-parser = "0.1.1"
+fsqlite-planner = "0.1.1"
+fsqlite-wal = "0.1.1"
+fsqlite-btree = "0.1.1"
+fsqlite-ast = "0.1.1"
+fsqlite-mvcc = "0.1.1"
+fsqlite-observability = "0.1.1"

@@ -152,8 +152,8 @@ self_update = [
 
 # Override crates.io fsqlite with the frankensqlite Git HEAD so standalone
 # builds and `cargo install` work without requiring a local sibling checkout.
-# For local development with a sibling checkout, cargo will prefer path deps
-# if ../frankensqlite exists (add path overrides to .cargo/config.toml).
+# For local development with a sibling checkout, add path overrides to
+# .cargo/config.toml pointing to /dp/frankensqlite/crates/*.
 [patch.crates-io]
 fsqlite              = { git = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite", package = "fsqlite" }
 fsqlite-ast          = { git = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite", package = "fsqlite-ast" }
